Melixis  

Merchant
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded May 8th, 2014 by wiscookie

  • This mob spawns at +624,+2047,+57.89 in a hut in the north side of the kerran village.
  • Class: Shaman
  • Attackable: Yes
  • Findable (via Ctrl-F): No

You say, 'Hail, Melixis'

Melixis says, 'Welcome to Melixis' shop. Rrrr. Feel free to brrrowse thrrrough my warrres. Melixis also find some [shiny tings] she may trade you.'

You say, 'shiny tings'

Melixis says, 'In Melixis' travels of the Odus, she find a [dull ring], a [kinda shiny ring], and a [really shiny ring]. Maybe you want to trade for those tings? Rrrr...'

You say, 'dull ring'

Melixis says, 'For dat ting? You brrring Melixis some bracket mildew. Rarr...'

You say, 'kinda shiny ring'

Melixis says, 'Hmm... Hamed need faerix spores forrr potion. Rrrrr. You brring some to Melixis and she give you the kinda shiny ring.'

You say, 'really shiny ring'

Melixis says, 'You go find degenerated guk weed and Melixis gives you the really shiny ring.'

Her quest gives 3 of the 4 rings required for the Paw of Opolla quest.

Categories: Shaman (EQ Mob Class) | EverQuest | Templatized
This page last modified 2024-03-15 04:12:30.

Level: 20
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2019-05-04 22:14:20

Goods sold (15):
Allspice 5gp 2sp 4cp
Benzoin 5gp 2sp 4cp
Birthwort 5gp 2sp 4cp
Bottle of Milk 5cp
Fenugreek 5gp 2sp 4cp
Fish Scales 5cp
Fishcakes 1sp 5cp
Fresh Fish 2sp 6cp
Lucerne 5gp 2sp 4cp
Maidenhair Fern 5gp 2sp 4cp
Mandrake Root 5gp 2sp 4cp
Mullein 5gp 2sp 4cp
Night Shade 5gp 2sp 4cp
Sage Leaf 5gp 2sp 4cp
Water Flask 1sp

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Quests:
  Shiny Rings

Report a correction

Post Comment
Never KOS
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2019 at 7:36 AM Rating: Good
Sippin
Sage
3,058 posts
A true capitalist, this vendor will sell to anyone, even if you've been killing her brethren non-stop. Which is nice in an XP zone like this. You just have to clear nearby cats who do hate you since they will add, and sometimes from quite a distance, if you attempt to do business with this money-orientated kitty.
____________________________
Sippin 115 DRU **** Firiona Vie ****Agnarr
FV: 115 WAR ENC CLE MAG WIZ SHD SHM Master Alchemist ROG Master Tinkerer & Poison-Maker
Master Artisan (300+) * Baker * Brewer * Fletcher * Jeweler * Potter * Researcher * Smith * Tailor
Agnarr: 65 DRU ENC SHD MAG CLE ROG WIZ BRD WAR PAL BST RNG MNK

# Jan 14 2011 at 4:46 AM Rating: Excellent
Byren
Guru
2,467 posts
Includes 12 new items:

[Fri Jan 14 02:45:33 2011] Melixis tells you, 'That'll be 5 gold 2 silver 4 copper per Allspice.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:45:34 2011] Melixis tells you, 'That'll be 5 gold 2 silver 4 copper per Benzoin.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:45:35 2011] Melixis tells you, 'That'll be 5 gold 2 silver 4 copper per Birthwort.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:45:35 2011] Melixis tells you, 'That'll be 5 copper per Bottle of Milk.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:45:36 2011] Melixis tells you, 'That'll be 5 gold 2 silver 4 copper per Fenugreek.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:45:37 2011] Melixis tells you, 'That'll be 5 copper per Fish Scales.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:45:38 2011] Melixis tells you, 'That'll be 1 silver 5 copper per Fishcakes.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:45:38 2011] Melixis tells you, 'That'll be 2 silver 6 copper per Fresh Fish.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:45:39 2011] Melixis tells you, 'That'll be 5 gold 2 silver 4 copper per Lucerne.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:45:40 2011] Melixis tells you, 'That'll be 5 gold 2 silver 4 copper per Maidenhair Fern.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:45:41 2011] Melixis tells you, 'That'll be 5 gold 2 silver 4 copper per Mandrake Root.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:45:42 2011] Melixis tells you, 'That'll be 5 gold 2 silver 4 copper per Mullein.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:45:42 2011] Melixis tells you, 'That'll be 5 gold 2 silver 4 copper per Night Shade.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:45:43 2011] Melixis tells you, 'That'll be 5 gold 2 silver 4 copper per Sage Leaf.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:45:44 2011] Melixis tells you, 'That'll be 1 silver per Water Flask.'

# Feb 01 2003 at 8:52 AM Rating: Good

Sage
293 posts

▲ Page top
Erudite Sk gets his paw
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2002 at 6:21 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Ok for you evils out there that are normally kos to these cats, you can still get your paw rings cos Melix is indifferent. I am a 38 Sk and went in invis, none of the cats saw through it, handed the guk weed and bracket mildew to Melix (not at the same time), got both rings and some exp. 2 cats in the room and aggroed on me and one somewhere else close by. I just ran outside, wited for casters to get half way through casting then hit FD. No prob, reinvised and walked out. Those evil clerics who don't have the luxury of FD can just gate or get a sow and run out.


Baelic
Erudite Sk
▲ Page top
Melixis
QuoteReply
# Jan 22 2002 at 2:24 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
After getting the weed, i took a trip to this "cat city". Now im a druid, so when i got there i just looked her up on track and sure enough, she was on it. Like someone posted before, her loc IS P520, P180. She is in a hut in the far back of the city. It is hard to get to her because that place is pretty hard to get used to, but with a little bit of walking around, you should be able to find her. ( If this helps , her hut is behind a big barn looking thing where there are Kobalt prisoners. ) =P
▲ Page top

Location
QuoteReply
# Dec 19 2001 at 11:27 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Her loc is 520 180.

Us Iksar don't have the luxury of running all over the island and casually checking in on the kute kitty kustomers. It's very tough to FD when five shamen are casting on you, even when they are all green. Someone is going to pay out the wazoo for this paw.


Forsaiken One
Iksar Monk of Tholuxe Paells
▲ Page top
Melixis
QuoteReply
# Nov 23 2001 at 5:44 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
After 7 hours camping the mutant fungi I got both the bracket mildew and the degenerated guk weed. I then spent 5 hours camping Moltar I got the gold and plat rings. I then picked up the silver on my way to get the copper with the trade in when to my amazement Miss Melixis is not around. I have been visiting the island for 2 days RL now staying for 24 EQ hours at a visit she has failed to appear anywhere on the island. I was wondering if anyone out there knows when, how long, or if she will ever join us Norathians again. Any information on her spawn time or maybe a Place Holder would be greatly appreciated.

Kagoran Furrfoot
33 Druid Halfling
Veeshan Server

Raise Faction
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2001 at 2:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762024263
51 posts
To raise the beta neutral faction give 50 gold to Orctilius in south ro. I believe it raises temple of ro faction too.

Can also give Tarn (enchanter pet vendor in highpass) a bloodstone.

# Sep 07 2001 at 5:42 PM Rating: Default

I was wondering what her loc is, so I can go straight to her without having to wonder around. I'm a lvl 42 Necro and both times I casted gather shadow to try to find her but was aggro twice by greens, guess some of them can see through invis.
▲ Page top
faction
QuoteReply
# Sep 03 2001 at 8:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758082994
8 posts
well, it seems to me the best thing to do here is wait til you are the appropriate level to do this quest, then everything in this zone should con green anyway and you don't hafta worry about having faction....just like the goblin merchants and banker in Runnyeye. No one under level 25 should really have a paw of opalla unless they are twinked or have mega guild help. Gynok who drops the plat ring can't be killed till you're pretty tough, try to keep the game more interesting....best way is to earn your stuff yourself.
▲ Page top
Stefan

Harmony doesnt work, neither do Invis, Atone, Wolfform *lol*

Melixis
QuoteReply
# May 12 2001 at 12:54 PM Rating: Default

Anonymous
Is Melixis faction betaneutral or kerran
▲ Page top
Factions not needed!
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2000 at 8:25 AM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
You can still do the ring quest even if they look at you "Ready to Attack". When you first enter Kerra Island, have a high level Druid with you
(35+). Have him cast invis on you before goin to Melixis and make sure he has EVAC memorized. Get behind Melixis and give her the mildew. Every Kerra will attack you except for Melixis. Get the ring and have your Druid friend cast EVAC. I've done this twice with my Ogre for the copper and gold ring. Works everytime!
▲ Page top
RE: Factions not needed!
QuoteReply
# Oct 30 2000 at 10:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245700005
6 posts

▲ Page top
Paw of Opalla
QuoteReply
# Apr 27 2000 at 2:11 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This is the merchant that now is part of the Paw of Opalla quest. The silver ring can still be found at the bottom of the pond in BlackBurrow. The Degenerated Guk Weeds can be found off the Mutant Fungus in UpGuk. Get this weed and turn it into Melixis and bingo, the gold ring. But good luck camping the fungus... )
▲ Page top
